improvements: refactor/auth.py: add type annotations, replace print() with logging, remove macOS-specific Safari browser registration, raise FileNotFoundError instead of exit(1)
refactor/gmail_labeler.py: add type annotations to all public functions, replace all print() with logging.getLogger calls, configure logging.basicConfig in main()
refactor/delete_job_emails.py: add type annotations to all public functions, replace all print() with logging.getLogger calls, configure logging.basicConfig in main()
test: add pytest suite with 16 tests (mocked Gmail API, no credentials needed) — test_auth.py (6), test_labeler.py (5), test_delete.py (5)
ci: add GitHub Actions CI workflow (ubuntu-latest, Python 3.11, pytest on push/PR)
docs: update README with CI badge and Testing section
fix: CI actions/checkout@v4 + setup-python@v5 (were v6, non-existent - CI was broken)
feat: --dry-run flag for gmail_labeler.py previews label counts without making changes
fix: with_retry now retries on OSError/ConnectionError/TimeoutError in addition to HttpError
fix: type annotations on _cb callback in gmail_labeler.py; remove quoted Optional in label_interviews.py
test: 5 new tests (network retry x3, dry-run label creation, dry-run thread count)
chore: pytest-cov in requirements; [tool.ruff.lint] + coverage config + [tool.pytest.ini_options] in pyproject.toml
chore: remove stale in-file README comment block from gmail_labeler.py
docs: README updated with dry-run usage, Makefile shortcuts, updated test counts
